description:
flake.nix uses rust-overlay's stable.latest, meaning the dev environment
drifts with each flake update. This can cause silent breakage when a new
Rust version changes behavior.

Fix: Pin to a specific version (e.g., rust-bin.stable.'1.94.1'.default)
to ensure reproducible builds. Update deliberately via PR.
title: Pin Rust toolchain version in flake.nix
